versions.version_description: The interlude is completely rewritten on the chords and sounds much more like the original than the existing chord contributions.
Original tabbed out with the help of this tutorial. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JFimkHUAB8w changed chords and added small transition.
I couldn't find a version where the chords on the 3rd verse sounds similar to the orignal song so I made a few changes and tried to keep this version easier to the beginners.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Slow Dancing In A Burning Room
Waiting On The World To Change

content:
[Verse]
                          
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]
i know a girl[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]                            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
she puts the color inside of my world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
she's just like a maze[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Asus[/ch]                            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
where all of the walls all continually change[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
I've done all i can  [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Asus[/ch]                                     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
to stand on the steps with my heart in my hands[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
Now i started to see[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Asus[/ch]                            [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
maybe its got nothing to do with me. [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
so fathers be good to your daughters,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
daughters will love like you do,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
girls become lovers who turn into mothers[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
so mothers be good to your daughters too. [/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]Bm[/ch]* [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] x2


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
Oh you see that skin[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Asus[/ch]                               [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  walk to [ch]B[/ch]
its the same shes been standing in[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]      
since the day she say him walkin away[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Asus[/ch]                                                     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
now she’s left   cleaning up the mess he made[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
so fathers be good to your daughters,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
daughters will love like you do,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
girls become lovers who turn into mothers[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
so mothers be good to your daughters too. [/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]  ([ch]D[/ch] shape)           [ch]D#[/ch] (Dshape)          [ch]D[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch] shape)
boys you can break          [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]       
find out how much they can take[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]                 
boys will be strong and [/tab]
[tab] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
boys soldier on[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A#6/F[/ch]
but boys would be gone [/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]B6/G[/ch]
without warmth of a woman's good good heart[/tab]
[ch]Bm7[/ch]* [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] x2
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]* [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 
on behalf of every man[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]* [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 
looking out for every girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]* [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
you are the god and the weight of her world[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
so fathers be good to your daughters,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
daughters will love like you do,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
girls become lovers who turn into mothers[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
so mothers be good to your daughters too. [/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
so mothers be good to your daughters too.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
so mothers be good to your daughters too[/tab]





Chords are:
[ch]Bm[/ch]            [x x 0 4 3 2] ([ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]) : minor triad
[ch]Em7[/ch]           Just put your 1st finger on 2nd fret 2nd string (A)
[ch]Asus[/ch]          [0 0 2 2 3 0] ([ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]) : no 3rd but A 4th from A major triad 
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         Put your 1st finger on top of the 3 higher pitched strings on the 
              2nd fret [0 0 0 2 2 2][/tab]
